  sl  local_address                         remote_address                      st tx_queue rx_queue tr tm->when retrnsmt   uid  timeout inode
   0: 00000000000000000000000000000000:0035 00000000000000000000000000000000:0000 07 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000     1000        0 77777 2 0000000000000000 0
   1: 00000000000000000000000001000000:1509 00000000000000000000000000000000:0000 01 00000000:00000000 00:00000000 00000000     1000        0 77778 2 0000000000000000 0
